McBets APP 1:35 PM

NCAAF NATTY MAX

Miami +10 (-135) 4u
Make sure you sprinkle half unit on their ML as it's doable tonight
This line is so high due to recency bias of the last two performances. I haven't forgotten Miami's performance against Ohio State and if they can play like that tonight, then this will come down to the end. As long as they don't completely shoot themselves in foot like Oregon did we should have plenty of opportunities tonight.
Have a great night and let's cash another Natty
